expectations.text: Response includes a visual directory tree structure showing the full workspace layout
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-43: Complete workspace tree with CLAUDE.md, CONTEXT.md, _config/ (conventions.md, workspace.md), and four stages (planning, src, docs, ops) each with CONTEXT.md, references/, output/.

expectations.text: Response includes a CLAUDE.md template with a routing table
expectations.evidence: Lines 124-166: Complete CLAUDE.md template. Lines 138-144: Routing table with Task/Go to/Read/Focus columns mapping four task types to four stages.

expectations.text: Response includes CONTEXT.md content for at least 2 individual stages
expectations.evidence: All four stages have full CONTEXT.md: planning (lines 204-248), src (lines 254-300), docs (lines 306-348), ops (lines 354-397). Each has Inputs table, Process steps, Outputs, and Verify checklist.

expectations.text: Response mentions token budgets or context window efficiency
expectations.evidence: Lines 50-58: Five-layer table with ~800/~300/~200-500 token budgets. Line 519: 'Each stage loads ~2,000-4,000 tokens.' Line 587: 'Context isolation: Claude sees only 2,000-4,000 tokens per stage, not everything.'

expectations.text: Response includes Layer 3 reference files (_config/ or references/) separate from working directories
expectations.evidence: Lines 399-475: _config/conventions.md (file structure, naming, API versioning, response format, testing, TypeScript, database, security). Lines 477-521: _config/workspace.md (scope, assumptions, glossary, review gates, token budget).

expectations.text: Response distinguishes between stable reference material and per-run working artifacts
expectations.evidence: Line 59: 'factory vs. product: Your _config/ directory (Layer 3) contains your conventions — these never change. Your output/ directories (Layer 4) contain this run's work.' Line 565: explicit factory/product principle.
